title: Correctly report archiveSource if we can't find it
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Don't write only to a shadowing variable live only inside the switch, there is a formerly-shadowed variable used afterwards.

#### How to verify it

Break `newSingleItemArchive` so that it produces nothing, and observe the `expected to have archived a copy of` message.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: This should ideally never be reachable, so I think “No New Tests” is appropriate, but I’ll let repo maintainers make that decision (and perhaps recommend a testing approach).
